subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Purpose of the world, in that He hath, in truth and soundness, guided that Best-Beloved One to His true homeland, even as was spoken aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را که آنمحبوب را صحیحا سالما بوطن حقیقی بقول گوینده قبل گفت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
